name: Apparatus Parallax Column
pitch: A split-screen vertical runway where left and right columns travel in opposite directions, revealing unclipped images as they cross the viewport center.

lifecycle.idle: Columns are stationary, with centered images fully unclipped and focused
lifecycle.discovery: First scroll triggers counter-directional movements in both columns
lifecycle.buildUp: Images approach the center band, scaling up and opening their crops
lifecycle.peak: Active images align perfectly at the horizontal meridian in full scale
lifecycle.recovery: Images leave the center band, shrinking and cropping back to resting state
